material_pointers: existing mailto: pattern in footers and CTAs (hello@sdccug.example)
signals.confirmed_intent: Add a persistent Feedback button across all site pages that opens the visitor's email client via a mailto: link pre-filled to hello@sdccug.example with subject 'Site feedback'. Chosen because the site is fully static (no backend, no form POSTs per CLAUDE.md and the foundational-frontend-stack ADR); mailto matches existing RSVP and 'Get meetup updates' CTAs. Must follow coding standards: semantic HTML5, shared stylesheet .btn components, aria-current, WCAG AA, identical header/footer chrome across pages.
